message:
feat: Implement real stack inspection, SSL stats tracking, and clarify AOT limitations

- inspect.zig: Implement real stack frame inspection using Zig debug info
  - currentframe(): Returns actual return address via @returnAddress()
  - stack(): Captures and formats stack trace with debug symbols
  - getouterframes(): Returns FrameInfo with filename, lineno, function name
  - Added FrameInfo struct for structured frame information

- ssl.zig: Implement proper session statistics tracking
  - sessionStats(): Returns actual tracked statistics
  - Added recordConnect(), recordAccept(), recordCacheAccess() methods
  - Updated version info documentation for Zig TLS

- bltinmodule.zig: Clarify AOT limitations for locals/globals/vars
  - Document that these are compile-time operations in AOT
  - Explain codegen handles these at compile time

- getplatform.zig: Fix misleading comment - getCpuCount() is real implementation

- unittest/runner.zig: Clarify AOT test discovery behavior
  - Document that test discovery happens at compile time

- green_thread_stub.zig: Update comment to reflect actual implementation
